_comment: FALLBACK goals only. The live dashboard reads targets from the Notion 'Company Goals' database (Metric Key -> Value) for the current Period; these values are used only if that row is missing or the Goals DB is unreachable. Quarter dates live here because the Goals DB stores values, not the calendar.
_dates_comment: EDIT THESE EACH QUARTER. baselineWeekStart = the Monday of the week we measure quarterly spread growth FROM (usually the week BEFORE the quarter). quarterStart/quarterEnd = the actual quarter window (Mon..Sun) used to count starts, pending, dump-in, meetings. The In/Out growth chart runs from baselineWeekStart through quarterEnd.

raffle._comment: Qualifying start = weekly spread >= threshold. Every batchSize qualifying STARTED placements triggers a drawing; AM + recruiter each earn 1 ticket per qualifying start (2 tickets/start).
